_note: Sample youtube-letterbox-source-plan.json for the render-request preparer guard only. no-live/no-execute. instagramSourcePath intentionally does not exist so the preparer reports inputExists:false (fail-closed visibility, not an abort) — the preparer still writes a deterministic request JSON either way.

renderProfile.note: Matches scripts/create-youtube-shorts-letterbox-variant.mjs PROFILE exactly — scale to fit content box, pad to full 1080x1920 canvas with black background, centered.

riskNotes: no-live: no ffmpeg execution, no media generation, no API/network/env access performed by this planner.
The content unit manifest passed via --content-unit was read-only; this planner never mutates it.

plannedYoutubeSourcePath is a deterministic placeholder path — no file exists there until a later approved local media step actually runs scripts/create-youtube-shorts-letterbox-variant.mjs (or an equivalent) with --run.

nextStep: after the planned mp4 exists at plannedYoutubeSourcePath, rebuild/attach the content unit with --youtube-source "C:\tmp\money-shorts-os\t3_letterbox_plan_fixture\youtube_shorts_letterbox_1080x1920_v1_local_draft.mp4" and re-run --preflight --content-unit <manifest>.
